latin: Melange non solum pretiosissima erat, sed etiam mentem mutabat. Paulus, qui plus melange quam ceteri consumpserat, visiones futuri habere coepit. in visionibus suis bellum sacrum vidit quod totam galaxiam vastaret. milites suo nomine pugnantes vidit et sanguinem innumerabilium mortuorum. Paulus timebat ne hoc fatum inevitabile esset, sed viam aliam invenire non poterat.

questions.prompt: What effect did melange have on Paul's mind?
questions.target: It gave him visions of the future
choices: It made him forget his past
It gave him visions of the future

questions.prompt: What did Paul see in his visions?
questions.target: A holy war devastating the entire galaxy
choices: A holy war devastating the entire galaxy

questions.prompt: How did Paul feel about these visions?
questions.target: He feared this fate might be inevitable
choices: He feared this fate might be inevitable

translation: Melange was not only most precious, but also changed the mind. Paul, who had consumed more melange than others, began to have visions of the future. In his visions he saw a holy war that would devastate the entire galaxy. He saw soldiers fighting in his name and the blood of countless dead. Paul feared that this fate might be inevitable, but he could not find another way.
